snapGaza.title: Snap Gaza SaaS
snapGaza.short: A massive full-stack data management system for charity distribution.
snapGaza.description: Snap Gaza v2.0 is a comprehensive SaaS platform built for managing charity distribution operations at scale. It features a fully integrated Telegram Bot, complex multi-table database architecture, real-time dashboards, and automated reporting — serving thousands of families efficiently.
snapGaza.tech: Next.js, Supabase, Telegram Bot API, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS

portfolio.title: This Portfolio
portfolio.short: The site you're viewing — built with advanced AI interaction & UI/UX.
portfolio.description: A premium portfolio website showcasing advanced web technologies including Liquid Glassmorphism design, magnetic cursor interactions, fisheye lens distortion effects, full-page Framer Motion scroll snapping, and full bilingual (EN/AR) support with RTL layout.
portfolio.tech: Next.js, Framer Motion, next-intl, Tailwind CSS, SVG Filters

eliteAcademy.title: Elite Academy
eliteAcademy.short: A cybersecurity academy platform — supervised and managed by me.
eliteAcademy.description: Elite Academy is an educational platform focused on cybersecurity training and skill development. As the supervisor, I oversee curriculum design, student management, and platform operations to deliver high-quality learning experiences.
eliteAcademy.tech: Full-Stack Web Platform, LMS Integration, Student Management
